clause_ref: IEEE Std 1584-2018 §7 + Table 1 (arc-current) + Table 3 (incident-energy), 600 V class
formula_latex: (coefficient set — used by arc-current-formula-2018 + incident-energy-formula-2018; 13-term polynomial-in-V IE form per Table 3 + 10-term polynomial-in-V Iarc form per Table 1)
formula_plain_text: Empirical coefficients for IEEE Std 1584-2018 at the 600 V model class (208 V – 600 V). Two coefficient sets per electrode configuration: (a) incident_energy_coefficients (13 terms per row per Table 3, polynomial in V with cross-terms in log(Iarc), log(G), log(t), log(D), V·Iarc, V·G, V·log(t), V·log(D)), and (b) arc_current_coefficients (10 terms per row per Table 1, polynomial in V with terms in Ibf, G, V·Ibf, V·G, log(Ibf)). The 2018 model SUPERSEDES the 2002 Annex F simplified regression (which lives in method-2002-annex-f-<class>V-coefficients.json) — the shapes are not interchangeable.
_source: pending-source-vetting — IEEE Std 1584-2018 Tables 1 and 3 require an authoritative copy of the 2018 standard (IEEE distributes 1584-2018 only via the IEEE Xplore paywall or licensed reseller). Cross-checked structural shape against (a) ETAP application/white papers describing the 2018 model rollout (10-coef Iarc + 13-coef IE polynomial-in-V), (b) EasyPower release notes on the 2018 update, and (c) Bisson, P., 'Electrical Safety: Practical Solutions' Ch. 5 — these confirm the SHAPE of the model (10-coef + 13-coef polynomial-in-V with cross-terms) but the verbatim numerical coefficients are not reproducible without licensed access to IEEE Std 1584-2018 Annex A/Tables 1+3. Sprint A.3 implementer source-vetting on 2026-05-25 could not transcribe verified values; status remains pending-transcription.

worked_examples.name: Annex D.1 back-test (VCB at 480 V)
worked_examples.source: IEEE 1584-2018 Annex D Example D.1 — published reference example; numeric outputs cited from the standard text. Back-test cannot be executed until coefficients transcribed.

transcribed_by: DraftsMan skills repo — Sprint A.3 (Path Z2-ext)
license_note: Coefficient values are factual empirical fits from IEEE Std 1584-2018 Tables 1 and 3 — reproduced for interoperation when transcribed. Currently null pending authoritative transcription. The 2002 Annex F predecessor model is alongside in method-2002-annex-f-600V-coefficients.json.
